title: ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Teaching Associate Posts
description: Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Teaching Associate Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 ...
